Long-time guests still call it "the first banquet of Karachi" — a Shahrah-e-Faisal landmark that families have trusted with their biggest nights for over two decades.

Two Venues, One Address

Hall A & Hall B

Independent halls with their own stages and entrances — book one for an intimate evening, or open both for a wedding the whole family will talk about for years.

Hall A

Hall A — The Grand Floor

Up to 550 guests · mezzanine seating available
  • Ground floor plus an elevated mezzanine for extra seating or a quieter vantage point
  • Full-size stage built for a proper bridal entrance
  • Central air conditioning throughout
  • Wheelchair-accessible entrance
Hall B

Hall B — The Intimate Floor

Up to 500 guests · single-floor layout
  • A closer, single-level room favoured for Mehndis and smaller Valimas
  • Separate driveway and entrance from Hall A
  • Fully air-conditioned with dedicated buffet stations
  • Can be booked back-to-back with Hall A for same-week events
Hosting a larger celebration? Combine Hall A and Hall B for up to 1,200 guests under one roof — a favourite for families who want cousins, colleagues, and everyone in between at the same table.
